Fission yields were calculated from the ratio of the
relative yield to the sum of relative yields of
Nu-bar estimated from difference of mass 237 and the
sum of mean values of light and heavy fragment masses
No information on source of uncertainty.
Value given is small difference in large numbers
so precision is considered to be poor.

Data also measured relative to 237Np capture and
for an assumed LPTR neutron flux are also given,
